stories.title: 20,000 civilian sailors are stuck in the gulf that opens to the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Thousands of seafarers remain stuck as the Strait of Hormuz blockade continues. The United Nations urges for a plan to facilitate their release.

stories.title: Iran war has cost $25B, Pentagon says. And, SCOTUS strikes blow to Voting Rights Act
stories.description: The Pentagon estimates the war with Iran has cost $25 billion so far. And, the Supreme Court ruled that Louisiana's 2024 election map was "an unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

stories.title: Mirroring Gaza, Israel is destroying towns and villages in southern Lebanon
stories.description: In southern Lebanon, towns near the border with Israel have been largely destroyed by Israeli demolitions and strikes. Israel says it has been attacking Hezbollah infrastructure, but civilian infrastructure has also been significantly affected.

stories.title: Trump says he spoke with Putin about a possible ceasefire in Ukraine
stories.description: President Trump said he talked to Russian President Putin Wednesday about the wars in Ukraine and Iran.

stories.title: Trump says he is weighing reducing American troop presence in Germany after Iran feud
stories.description: President Trump suggested he could soon reduce the U.S. military presence in Germany as he continues to feud with Chancellor Friedrich Merz over the U.S-Israel war against Iran.

stories.title: Deadly Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
stories.description: At least nine people - including two children - were killed, according to Lebanon's health ministry.

stories.title: Israeli 'double-tap' strike kills three rescue workers in Lebanon, officials say
stories.description: They are among nine people killed in successive attacks on Tuesday, which Israel's military says targeted a Hezbollah commander.

stories.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
stories.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the US defence department has said only that the incident is under investigation.

stories.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
stories.description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

stories.title: Israeli strikes kill 14 in Lebanon amid ongoing ceasefire
stories.description: The US announced three days ago that the ceasefire was extended by three weeks after talks.

stories.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
stories.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

stories.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

stories.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
stories.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries has been extended by three weeks after talks in Washington.

stories.title: Middle East War Live: Iran’s supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities
stories.description: Iran’s supreme leader defiantly vowed Thursday to protect the Islamic Republic’s nuclear and missile capabilities, which US President Donald Trump has sought to curtail through airstrikes and as part of a wider deal to cement the war’s shaky ceasefire. Follow our liveblog for the...

stories.title: Jihadists urge united front against Mali junta as Bamako blockade begins
stories.description: Jihadist fighters in Mali have called for a broad uprising against the country’s military rulers, escalating tensions as they move to tighten pressure on the capital, Bamako. The appeal comes days after coordinated attacks on junta positions and coincides with the start of a bloc...

stories.title: Iran 'will not capitulate', conflict resolution expert says
stories.description: Iran's supreme leader declared Thursday that the United States had suffered a shameful defeat, defiantly rejecting a warning from President Donald Trump that an economically punishing US naval blockade could be enforced for months to come. Speaking with FRANCE 24's Sharon Gaffney...

stories.title: Iran’s supreme leader tells US its only place in Persian Gulf is at ‘bottom of its waters’
stories.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei on Thursday said the US had been defeated in its war against the Islamic Republic and that its only place in the Persian Gulf was “at the bottom of its waters". Khamenei's written message, which was read on state TV, was releas...

stories.title: Germany says 'prepared' for any US troop reduction
stories.description: Germany said Thursday it was "prepared" for a possible reduction in US troops threatened by President Donald Trump, who kept up his barrage of attacks on Chancellor Friedrich Merz. Trump said that Washington was considering redeploying some of the tens of thousands of its troops ...

stories.title: Pakistan: The US 'was always banking on' Islamabad mediation
stories.description: “The US was always going to bank on Pakistan.” Bilal Khan says #Pakistan’s role as mediator between the US and #Iran comes as no surprise, considering Trump’s partiality towards leaders Asim Munir. More on #F24Debate ➡️ https://f24.my/BtMM

stories.title: Iran war live: Tehran says US ports siege ‘intolerable’; Trump mulls action
stories.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least 2,586 people and wounded more than 8,000 since March 2, local media report.

stories.title: US gas reaches $4.30 per gallon; Trump says prices will drop after Iran war
stories.description: Price of petrol in US jumps by nearly 30 cents in one week amid Strait of Hormuz blockade and Iran diplomatic deadlock.

stories.title: Hegseth testifies on Iran war before Senate committee: Key takeaways
stories.description: Pentagon chief testifies alongside top general for second day, in first public Congressional hearings since war began.

stories.title: How is Israel replicating its Gaza tactics in Lebanon?
stories.description: Widespread Israeli attacks on civilian targets in Lebanon are a repeated tactic from Gaza.

stories.title: Trump says Iran can play at World Cup in US after FIFA confirmation
stories.description: FIFA chief Gianni Infantino has said Iran will play their World Cup matches, leading to agreement from US President.

stories.title: Iran will play World Cup games in US according to FIFA chief Infantino
stories.description: Iran's place at the US cohosted 2026 event has been in doubt since the US-Israeli war on their country.

stories.title: Piracy rises off Somalia as US-Israeli war on Iran diverts naval forces
stories.description: More than a dozen sailors, mostly from Pakistan, are being held by Somali pirates as hijackings and harassment surge.

stories.title: Lebanese girl mourns paramedic father killed in Israeli strike
stories.description: A young girl in Lebanon joined hundreds mourning her father, one of three paramedics killed in an Israeli attack.

stories.title: UN chief warns Hormuz closure ‘strangling’ global economy
stories.description: UNITED NATIONS: The escalating crisis in the Strait of Hormuz could push tens of millions into poverty, trigger a surge in global hunger and even tip the world toward recession, United Nations Secretary General Antonio Guterres warned on Thursday. The closure of the vital waterwa...

stories.title: Berlin strikes defiant tone as Trump-Merz sparring continues
stories.description: • US president tells German chancellor to stop interfering with Iran, focus on Ukraine war • German foreign minister says country is prepared for potential US troop reduction WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump criticised German Chancellor Friedrich Merz on Thursday, saying he ...

stories.title: Amazon says damaged UAE cloud region recovery to take several months
stories.description: Amazon said on Thursday that restoring cloud computing operations in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), which were damaged in the conflict in the Middle East, is expected to take several months. Amazon’s data centres in the region were hit by Iranian retaliatory drone strikes in ear...

stories.title: In fresh message, Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei defies US naval blockade
stories.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei declared on Thursday that the United States had suffered a shameful defeat, defiantly rejecting a warning from President Donald Trump that an economically punishing US naval blockade could be enforced for months to come. “Today, tw...

stories.title: Mamdani calls on King Charles to return Koh-i-Noor diamond
stories.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani called for King Charles to “return” the prized Koh-i-Noor diamond, which the British Empire took from the Indian subcontinent in the 1800s, on the third day of the monarch’s state visit on Wednesday. Before greeting Charles and Queen Camilla at ...

stories.title: US turns down Iranian proposal to end war
stories.description: • Trump warns Iran to ‘get smart soon’, accept N-curbs; signals months-long extension of naval blockade• Tehran warns of ‘unprecedented military action’ over shipping curbs• USS Gerald R. Ford to return after 10-month deployment in ME TEHRAN/WASHIN­GTON: Amid reports about Iran’s...

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Trump administration says its war in Iran has been ’terminated’ before 60-day deadline
stories.description: President Donald Trump said on Thursday he may pull U.S. troops from Italy and Spain due to their opposition to the Iran war, a day after proposing a similar reduction in Germany

stories.title: U.S. official says Iran war truce ‘terminated’ hostilities for war powers deadline
stories.description: There ⁠has been no exchange of fire between the ⁠U.S. armed forces and Iran since a fragile ceasefire began more than three weeks ago

stories.title: Israel-Iran war updates: Israel may have to 'act again' against Iran, Defence Minister Katz says
stories.description: Pakistan said that it was actively engaged with the U.S. and Iran to end the war in West Asia

stories.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 9 people, including 2 children
stories.description: Speaking to a delegation from the International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies, President Joseph Aoun had earlier slammed “continuing Israeli violations” in south Lebanon

stories.title: U.K. calls antisemitism an emergency as police investigate stabbing attack on 2 Jewish men
stories.description: Police have arrested a 45-year-old man on suspicion of attempted murder and labelled the stabbing attack as an act of terrorism. Detectives are working to determine a motive and whether there is any link to Iranian proxies

stories.title: Trump in fresh attack on Germany's Merz over Iran
stories.description: He added that Merz should spend "less time on interfering with those that are getting rid of the Iran Nuclear threat, thereby making the World, including Germany, a safer place!”
